goog.module('nativejstypes.GenericRegularClass.NativeInterface.$Overlay$impl');

const Bar = goog.require('nativejstypes.Bar');

let Foo = goog.forwardDeclare('com.acme.MyFoo');

/** @nodts */
class $Overlay {
 /** @nodts */
 static $clinit() {
  $Overlay.$clinit = () =>{};
  $Overlay.$loadModules();
 }
 
 /** @nodts */
 static $loadModules() {}
}

exports = $Overlay;
